nasb.text: Then Hannah prayed and said, “My heart exults in the Lord; My horn is exalted in the Lord, My mouth speaks boldly against my enemies, Because I rejoice in Your salvation.

esv.text: And Hannah prayed and said, “My heart exults in the Lord; my horn is exalted in the Lord. My mouth derides my enemies, because I rejoice in your salvation.

cnv.text: 哈拿禱告說： “我的心因耶和華喜樂， 我的角因耶和華高舉， 我的口向仇敵大大誇耀， 因為我以你的救恩為樂。

ccb.text: 哈娜祷告说： “我的心因耶和华而欢喜， 我的力量因耶和华而倍增， 我的口向敌人夸耀， 我因耶和华的拯救而快乐。
